Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.fluxnova

Class FluxnovaInImpl

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.xml.impl.instance.ModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.BpmnModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.fluxnova.FluxnovaInImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BpmnModelElementInstance, FluxnovaIn, ModelElementInstance
public class FluxnovaInImpl extends BpmnModelElementInstanceImpl implements FluxnovaIn
The BPMN in camunda extension element
Author:
Sebastian Menski
